summary: Mixed reception; nostalgic opening chant and PITB moment are praised, but some consider it a weak New Year's show, with no clear details on recording quality.
review: One reviewer reminisces about the hall‑side chant that led into an enthusiastic "Playin'" opening and a memorable PITB moment, calling the performance dreamy. Another fan labels this New Year's concert as one of the worst ever, unfavorably comparing it to the early‑80s shows. No reviewers comment on the audio source or fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews with divergent opinions (4★ and 1★) produce an average around 2.5; limited technical detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers do not discuss sound clarity, mix, or source type; assessment is based on absence of information.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening chant and PITB moment are highlighted positively, but overall the show is criticized as a sub‑par New Year's performance.
